snps.effect_template: HLA-DQ2.5 tag SNP. Major genetic risk factor for celiac disease (~95% of patients carry DQ2).
HLA-DQ8 tag SNP. Secondary celiac risk allele (found in remaining ~5% of patients).

recommendation_template: If you carry HLA-DQ2/DQ8 AND have symptoms (bloating, diarrhea, fatigue), consider tTG-IgA blood test. Genetic predisposition alone doesn't mean celiac — only ~3% of carriers develop it.

studies.title: Dense genotyping identifies and localizes multiple common and rare variant association signals in celiac disease
studies.finding: HLA-DQ2.5 (rs2187668) confers highest genetic risk for celiac disease (OR~7)
